# Internal ZAP baseline targets for the local demo stack.
# Keep this out of robots.txt; external crawlers should not index the demo.
#
# PI-specific frontend routes need a real seeded PI id. Add them here once demo
# seeding uses stable ids, or have the ZAP workflow generate them from /api/pi.

http://127.0.0.1:3000/
http://127.0.0.1:3000/pi
http://127.0.0.1:3000/art-setup
http://127.0.0.1:3000/roadmap

http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json
http://127.0.0.1:8000/art
http://127.0.0.1:8000/team
http://127.0.0.1:8000/pi
http://127.0.0.1:8000/features
http://127.0.0.1:8000/stories
http://127.0.0.1:8000/objectives
http://127.0.0.1:8000/risks
http://127.0.0.1:8000/dependencies
http://127.0.0.1:8000/capacity-plans

http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/art
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/team
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/pi
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/features
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/stories
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/objectives
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/risks
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/dependencies
http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/capacity-plans
